message: fix: dialect handling and release checkout

files.patch:
@@ -29,6 +29,8 @@ jobs:
     timeout-minutes: 15
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          ref: ${{ github.event.inputs.tag || github.ref }}
 
       - name: Clone asupersync dependency
         run: |
@@ -57,6 +59,8 @@ jobs:
     if: ${{ (startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/') || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch') && !contains(github.ref, '-') && !contains(github.event.inputs.tag, '-') }}
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          ref: ${{ github.event.inputs.tag || github.ref }}
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
@@ -127,6 +131,8 @@ jobs:
 
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          ref: ${{ github.event.inputs.tag || github.ref }}
 
       - name: Clone asupersync dependency (Unix)
         if: runner.os != 'Windows'
@@ -202,6 +208,8 @@ jobs:
     timeout-minutes: 15
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          ref: ${{ github.event.inputs.tag || github.ref }}
 
       - name: Download all artifacts
         uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
